What I do

AI, engineered for outcomes

Six focused capabilities — combined into whatever your problem actually needs.

AI Application Development

From idea to production — intelligent applications your team and customers actually love.

Learn more

Machine Learning & Data Science

Models and pipelines that surface insight, predict outcomes, and optimize decisions.

Learn more

Intelligent Process Automation

AI-driven automation for the repetitive work that slows your team down.

Learn more

AI Consulting & Strategy

Cut through the hype and find where AI actually moves the needle for you.

Learn more

Natural Language Processing

Understand, search, and generate text — from documents to conversations.

Learn more

Computer Vision Solutions

Detection, classification, and analysis for images and video.

Learn more

Flagship venture

Phansora — my AI product suite

Beyond client work, I build and run my own AI products. Phansora is a suite of four: Book Alchemy, Dossier Nova, Chrono Origin, and SpokenVerse — proof I ship real, self-serve AI, not just slide decks.

How I work

A simple, honest process

01

Discover

We pin down the real problem and whether AI is the right tool.

02

Design

A pragmatic plan: scope, data, architecture, and cost.

03

Build

Iterative delivery you can see and steer every week.

04

Ship & support

Deployed to production, monitored, and improved.

Let’s build something intelligent

Tell me what you’re working on — I’ll tell you honestly whether AI is the right tool, and how I’d build it.

Start a project Email me
My New AI

My New AI is an independent AI software studio — we design, build, and ship intelligent applications, from custom AI apps to machine learning, NLP, and computer vision.
